blocks.text: Done. The pack is clean, the three questions are written up and in your inbox, and I marked the two {{fact:f:E-2023-001.client}} revenue figures as unverified in the framework the way John Macias asked rather than leaving them out.
Nothing else from me before Thursday. Once Jennifer Herrera comes back on the Suarez-Jones timeline, those are the last open items before the framework is ready for a first internal read.
